data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan and Eastern Sabah until 5:00AM; Tuesday, 30 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan dan Sabah Timur sehingga 5:00 pagi; Selasa, 30 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, northwestern part of Bunguran, Reef North, Layang-Layang, Palawan and Sulu until 5:00AM; Tuesday, 30 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, barat laut Bunguran, Reef North, Layang-Layang, Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 5:00 pagi; Selasa, 30 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Padang Terap, Yan, Pendang and Kuala Muda);  Terengganu  (Kemaman);  Pahang  (Kuantan, Pekan and Rompin);  Negeri Sembilan  (Port Dickson, Rembau and Tampin);  Melaka ;  Johor  (Tangkak, Segamat, Muar, Batu Pahat, Kluang, Pontian, Kulai, Kota Tinggi and Johor Bahru);  Sarawak:  Sri Aman, Sarikei (Julau), Sibu, Kapit (Song and Belaga), Bintulu (Tatau and Sebauh), Miri (Beluru, Telang Usan and Marudi) and Limbang; and  Sabah:  Interior (Nabawan) and Sandakan (Tongod, Telupid, Beluran and Sandakan) until 5:00AM; Tuesday, 30 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Padang Terap, Yan, Pendang dan Kuala Muda);  Terengganu  (Kemaman);  Pahang  (Kuantan, Pekan dan Rompin);  Negeri Sembilan  (Port Dickson, Rembau dan Tampin);  Melaka ;  Johor  (Tangkak, Segamat, Muar, Batu Pahat, Kluang, Pontian, Kulai, Kota Tinggi dan Johor Bahru);  Sarawak:  Sri Aman, Sarikei (Julau), Sibu, Kapit (Song dan Belaga), Bintulu (Tatau dan Sebauh), Miri (Beluru, Telang Usan dan Marudi) dan Limbang; dan  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Nabawan) dan Sandakan (Tongod, Telupid, Beluran dan Sandakan) sehingga 5:00 pagi; Selasa, 30 Jun 2026.
